name: GRU Tier
description: Single recurrent tier: one GRU step over input given hidden state. DROGA tiers are stacks of these at different cycle rates.
code:
_gt{{_id}}_Wz = np.random.randn({{in_dim}}+{{dim}}, {{dim}}).astype(np.float32)*0.02
_gt{{_id}}_Wr = np.random.randn({{in_dim}}+{{dim}}, {{dim}}).astype(np.float32)*0.02
_gt{{_id}}_Wh = np.random.randn({{in_dim}}+{{dim}}, {{dim}}).astype(np.float32)*0.02
_gt{{_id}}_xh = np.concatenate([{{x}}, {{h_prev}}], axis=-1)
_gt{{_id}}_z = 1/(1+np.exp(-(_gt{{_id}}_xh @ _gt{{_id}}_Wz)))
_gt{{_id}}_r = 1/(1+np.exp(-(_gt{{_id}}_xh @ _gt{{_id}}_Wr)))
_gt{{_id}}_c = np.tanh(np.concatenate([{{x}}, _gt{{_id}}_r*{{h_prev}}], axis=-1) @ _gt{{_id}}_Wh)
{{h_new}} = (1-_gt{{_id}}_z)*{{h_prev}} + _gt{{_id}}_z*_gt{{_id}}_c
